info.name: CarWash API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the CarWash booking platform. All endpoints prefixed with `http://localhost:8000/api/`.

**Auth Flow:**
1. Register or Login → get `access` + `refresh` tokens
2. Set `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` header for protected endpoints
3. Use `api/auth/token/refresh/` when access expires

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8000`
**Content-Type:** `application/json` (unless file uploads)

request.description: Uptime check. No auth required.
Download OpenAPI 3.0 schema JSON.
Interactive API documentation (Swagger UI).
Create a new account. `role` can be `customer` or `provider`. Returns user data + OTP code. Then verify with `/api/auth/otp/verify/` to get JWT tokens.
Login with phone + password. Returns `access` and `refresh` tokens.
Blacklist the refresh token. Requires auth.
Get a new access token using the refresh token.
Request an OTP code. Purpose: `verification` (default) or `password_reset`. Code returned in response (dev only).
Verify an OTP code. On success returns access + refresh tokens.
Change password while logged in (requires old_password).
Reset password using OTP code (no auth required). First request OTP, then use code here.
Get the currently logged-in user's profile. GET to read, PATCH to update.
Update profile fields (full_name, email, avatar, language).
Update user language preference (e.g. 'en', 'ar').
Get full customer profile with saved addresses, payment cards, and user info.
GET to list all saved addresses. POST to create a new one.
Create a new saved address.
GET to read, PATCH to update, DELETE to remove a saved address.
GET to list payment cards. POST to add a new card.
Add a new payment card.
GET to read, PATCH to update, DELETE to remove a payment card.
GET to list vehicles. POST to add a new vehicle.
Add a new vehicle. `engine_type` and `vehicle_type` are FK IDs from services.
GET to read, PATCH to update, DELETE to remove a vehicle.
GET to read full provider profile (with documents, bank, availability). PATCH to update bio.
Update provider bio and other profile fields.
Toggle provider online/offline status.
Update provider's current GPS location.
GET to list uploaded documents. POST to upload a new document (use form-data).
Upload a provider document. `doc_type` values: `license`, `id_proof`, `insurance`, `other`. Use multipart/form-data.
GET to view bank details. POST to save bank account info.
Save provider's bank account for payouts.
GET to list availability slots. POST to set availability (single or array).
Set a single availability slot. `day_of_week`: 0=Sun, 1=Mon ... 6=Sat. Can also send an array of slots.
List all available car wash services. Public endpoint.
List vehicle types (sedan, SUV, etc.). Public.
List engine types (petrol, diesel, electric, hybrid). Public.
List dirt levels with extra prices. Public.
Create a new booking. `schedule_type`: `now` or `scheduled`. If scheduled, provide `scheduled_at` (ISO datetime). Photos can be included as array of image files using multipart/form-data.
List customer's bookings. Supports `?status=pending` query filter.
Get booking details with nested service, vehicle, dirt_level, provider info, photos, and payment card.
Cancel a booking (customer only). Provide optional cancel_reason.
Add a tip for the provider on a completed booking.
Rate a completed booking (1-5 stars + optional comment).
List available/assigned jobs for the logged-in provider. Supports `?status=pending`.
Get job details for a specific booking (provider view).
Provider accepts a pending booking job. No body needed.
Provider rejects a pending booking job.
Update job status. Flow: `accepted` → `en_route` → `in_progress` → `completed`. Provider only.
Get provider's earnings summary + transaction list.
Get ratings received by the logged-in user (provider gets their reviews, customer gets their submitted reviews).
List all notifications for the logged-in user.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for the logged-in user.
Admin dashboard with aggregated stats (total users, bookings, revenue, etc.)
List all users. Supports `?role=customer`, `?status=active`, `?search=john`.
GET to view, PATCH to update user details.
Block/ban a user account.
Unblock a previously banned user.
List all documents for a specific provider.
Approve or reject a provider document. `status`: `approved` or `rejected`.
Approve a provider (set status to approved).
Reject a provider application.
List all bookings. Supports `?status=pending` and `?search=`.
Get booking details (admin view).
Admin can cancel any booking.
Admin earnings dashboard aggregated data.
List all provider payouts. Supports `?status=paid`.
Retry a failed payout.
GET to list all services. POST to create a new service.
Create a new car wash service.
GET to view, PATCH to update, DELETE to remove a service.
GET to read platform config (fees, commission rates). PATCH to update.
Update platform fee and commission settings.
Send bulk notification. `target`: `all`, `customers`, or `providers`. Task runs async via Celery.
